codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit dcfc06e and the resulting component/test files for StatBlock, RecDot, and KbdHint. The implementation matches the feature description: KbdHint was extracted to src/ui, StatBlockProps and RecDotProps are exported, EditorView consumes KbdHint from the ui barrel, and the added tests cover the required rendering and prop-state behavior without revealing correctness issues in scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-redesign skill says workers must invoke frontend-design at the start of the session, but this worker transcript shows only mission-worker-base and frontend-redesign before implementation. Either the skill procedure is stricter than real practice for small extraction tasks, or the followedProcedure signal is not reliable enough to use as-is.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: D:\coding\somewhat\.factory\skills\frontend-redesign\SKILL.md: 'frontend-design: Invoke this skill at the START of your session.' summary: Pass. The feature cleanly extracts KbdHint into src/ui, exports the StatBlock and RecDot prop interfaces, updates the barrel/import path usage, and adds sufficient focused tests for the requested behavior. No actionable code issues were found in the reviewed scope.
